productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Canvas Navy Blue Belt
description: A wardrobe essential, a belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac by wrangler perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with jeans, casual shoes and a colourful tee or shirt.Length: 85 cmMade of canvas and genuine leather for durabilityTang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeLeather at the buckle and tail of the belt and branding embossed on the loop for style CareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
